creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 221634
patch using install targets for docs and examples; ordered Makefile vars

Hi Mikhail,

I suggest to change your 'if ${PORT_OPTIONS ...' into more modern post-install targets, see attached patched.

Other changes I did in the patch:

- Reorder some Makefile vars, like suggested by 'portclippy Makefile' (from ports-mgmt/portfmt)
- Using secured URL in pkg-descr
- Reorder pkg-plist entries


If you agree, I will commit this patch ;)
